build_system: Gradle 8.14.5 with Kotlin 2.1.21 multiplatform plugin. KorGE consumed as library (not plugin). :core is pure logic, :game is KorGE renderer, :composeApp is retired waitroom.
test_framework: kotlin.test in :core (commonTest). No test framework in :game (compile-only verification + headless screenshot rendering).
verification_instructions: 1. ./gradlew :core:desktopTest (unit tests green). 2. ./gradlew :game:compileKotlinDesktop (compile check). 3. ./gradlew :composeApp:compileKotlinDesktop (compile check). 4. ./gradlew :game:screenshot (renders PNGs to build/screenshots/, requires Mesa EGL). 5. Verify all PNGs exist with >1KB size.
snapshot_or_generated_files: build/screenshots/*.png - generated by ./gradlew :game:screenshot. Not checked into git but used for visual verification.
setup_instructions: Mesa EGL needed for screenshots: dnf install -y mesa-libEGL mesa-dri-drivers mesa-libgbm mesa-libGL. Environment vars: EGL_PLATFORM=surfaceless LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1. Java 21 required for :game desktop target.
environment_constraints: No Android SDK in sandbox. No real GL window (headless only). KorGE Audio has no backend in headless/CI - graceful degradation needed. Screenshots are deterministic (fixed time values, no randomness).
contribution_requirements: Handoff protocol: branch from origin/main as kiro/<name>. SCOPE.modify/create lists what can be touched. Tests in :core are always allowed. DO_NOT_TOUCH: settings.gradle.kts, build.gradle.kts (no new deps unless in brief). Docs must be updated. Result-report required. Screenshot harness uses localCurrentDirVfs (B007 pitfall).
key_patterns: State grids in :core (pure Kotlin, no engine deps) + ShaderFilter in :game (GLSL fragment shaders with UniformBlock). Each filter: fixedLocation unique int, companion object : BaseProgramProvider(), FragmentShaderDefault{} or FragmentShader{}, updateUniforms(). ShaderEffects central registry manages time + attach/detach. ScreenshotHarness uses korgeScreenshotTest(Size(640,360)) for deterministic rendering. MapConfig companion has interior()/exterior() factory methods.
directory_structure: :core/src/commonMain/kotlin/rpg/ - pure game logic (bark, combat, items, questbook, tiled, world, etc). :core/src/commonTest/kotlin/rpg/ - unit tests. :game/src/desktopMain/kotlin/game/ - KorGE scenes, sprites, map rendering. :game/src/desktopMain/kotlin/game/shader/ - all GLSL shader filters. assets/ - sprites, tilemaps, audio at repo root.
